name: superteam
description: V4.7 main-session-as-orchestrator. PLAN Tier A close-out done in V4.7.3 (self-stop/stage-skip/artifact-forge all hook-blocked). V4.7.4 finishes PLAN Tier B engineering close-out: per-role Output Discipline rules added to reviewer/verifier/writer/planner/architect/executor (B1+C2); Stop-hook escalation diagnostic when 3+ gate violations cluster within 60s (B2); three new slash commands /superteam:debug, /superteam:repair, /superteam:doctor (B3-B5) for triage and recovery. Only PLAN Tier C1 remains - the end-to-end pytest suite that exercises the full hook trust chain - and that is testing infrastructure, not a bug-fix backlog.
